work_history.title: Director of Analytics
work_history.description: Built and led a centralized Center of Excellence supporting analytics infrastructure for 9 pharmaceutical brands and 40+ digital properties. Developed innovative measurement frameworks. Enabled shift from weekly to near real-time campaign reporting.

work_history.title: Director of Analytics
